codeReview.summary: The implementation perfectly matches the requirements for all four security/quality fixes. The useAuth hook safely checks auth on mount via useEffect, avoiding render-phase side effects. AuthGuard cleanly handles loading states, returning null for SSR and a spinner during auth checks, eliminating content flashes. The api.ts token refresh loop uses standard promise deduplication correctly, clearing only after resolve. Both login and register forms apply aria-describedby dynamically referencing explicit error IDs.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker correctly diagnosed a react-hooks/set-state-in-effect linting issue during implementation and fixed it proactively by restructuring state initialization to avoid synchronous state updates in effects.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows: Two lint issues: (1) `setIsLoading(false)` synchronously in effect when not authenticated... The lint rule `react-hooks/set-state-in-effect` flags synchronous setState calls in the body of a useEffect... The best approach is to initialize `isLoading` based on the auth state, so we don't need to synchronously set it in the effect

summary: All 4 dashboard fixes accurately implemented. Validation (build, type, lint) fully passes, and manual UI verification scripts confirmed the changes.
